content.fact_text: Production-ready Redis client wrapper using 'ioredis' and 'opossum' for fault-tolerant caching.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements a singleton Redis client with circuit breaking, structured logging, and robust connection management using ioredis and Opossum. Supports standard CRUD and HSET/HGET operations with automatic JSON serialization/deserialization.
interfaces: set(key: string, value: any, ttlSeconds?: number): Promise<void>
hset(key: string, field: string, value: any): Promise<void>
hget<T>(key: string, field: string): Promise<T | null>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a resilient, fault-tolerant Redis interaction layer for the backend services.
